commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9c987f3e24c68312dba7d928806bacd54663cf67)
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads target_branch through repair comment routing and sweep workflow dispatch, changes repair-plan branch metadata to fetch the target repository default branch, removes the manual apply_min_age_minutes workflow input, and adds regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main hard-codes main in plan-cluster and in both sweep target_branch resolver paths. I did not establish a successful live GitHub workflow reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed for positive live proof and explicit maintainer acceptance of the workflow_dispatch input tradeoff; there is no narrow safe repair for automation to choose by itself.

target.title: fix: use target default branch in repair plans
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve target repository default branches in repair planning instead of hard-coding `main`.
- Preserve `target_branch` through repair comment-router dispatch, event review payload resolution, and the `sweep.yml` manual/scheduled planning fallback.
- Removed the manual `apply_min_age_minutes` workflow input so adding `target_branch` stays under GitHub's workflow_dispatch input limit.

## Review follow-up
- Follow-up `3da99c9137` added the manual `target_branch` input and first fallback path.
- Follow-up `9c987f3e24` fixed the second `sweep.yml` planning resolver that still ignored `github.event.inputs.target_branch`.
- Regression coverage now requires both `sweep.yml` target-branch resolver blocks to read `github.event.inputs.target_branch` under `workflow_dispatch` before falling back to `client_payload` or `main`.

## Live proof attempt
I attempted a narrow manual workflow-dispatch proof from the PR branch against the one OpenClaw repo I found with a non-`main` default branch:

```text
gh workflow run sweep.yml --repo openclaw/clawsweeper --ref codex/clawsweeper-default-branch \
  -f target_repo=openclaw/voice-community \
  -f target_branch=regional-ops-sop \
  -f batch_size=1 \
  -f shard_count=1 \
  -f codex_timeout_ms=120000 \
  -f apply_after_review=false
```

GitHub rejected that live proof attempt for this account:

```text
could not create workflow dispatch event: HTTP 403: Must have admin rights to Repository.
```

## Validation
- `pnpm run format && pnpm run build:repair && node --test test/repair/workflow-sparse-checkout.test.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern 'sweep workflow preserves|workflow_dispatch input count'` (371 tests passed)
- `pnpm run check` (passed: active surface, limits, build, lint, unit, repair, changed coverage, full coverage, format)

<!-- notify-refresh: 2026-06-09T09:02:00Z -->
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
